raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase from XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, package delivered on XX/XX/XXXX while I was away. That along with a second package was stolen from the mail area. Disputed with Amex XX/XX/XXXX, which was rejected. Dispute was resubmitted and denied again XX/XX/XXXX. Retailer will not provide refund and redirected me to XXXX to file claim and an error message keeps appearing instead.
